parameters.command:
=# Ultra-Fast Bulk Processing (MuPDF + Multithreading)
BASE_DIR="/data/output"
PROCESSED_DIR="$BASE_DIR/processed"
LOGS=""

# Helper for logging
log() { LOGS="$LOGS$1\n"; }

# 1. Setup folders
mkdir -p "$PROCESSED_DIR"
log "Archiving to: $PROCESSED_DIR"

# 2. Find ALL PDFs and handle spaces in filenames
TMP_LIST="$BASE_DIR/pdf_list_$$.tmp"
find "$BASE_DIR" -maxdepth 1 -type f \( -iname "*.pdf" \) > "$TMP_LIST"

if [ ! -s "$TMP_LIST" ]; then
  echo "{\"status\": \"info\", \"msg\": \"No new PDFs found.\"}"
  rm -f "$TMP_LIST"
  exit 0
fi

# 3. Process each PDF line by line to avoid space-splitting issues
while IFS= read -r PDF_PATH; do
  PDF_FILENAME=$(basename "$PDF_PATH")
  FOLDER_NAME="${PDF_FILENAME%.*}"
  TARGET_DIR="$BASE_DIR/$FOLDER_NAME"
  
  log "--- Ultra-Fast Processing: $PDF_FILENAME ---"
  
  # Guard against "processed" directory name conflicts
  if [ "$FOLDER_NAME" = "processed" ]; then
    log "Warning: PDF conflicts with processed directory. Skipping."
    continue
  fi

  # 4. Collision Check
  if [ -d "$TARGET_DIR" ]; then
    TIMESTAMP=$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)
    mv "$TARGET_DIR" "${TARGET_DIR}_old_$TIMESTAMP"
  fi
  
  mkdir -p "$TARGET_DIR"
  
  # 5. Extract using mutool (Extremely fast, renders directly to numbered files)
  # -r 72: 72 DPI (Standard resolution, ensures under 400KB for heavy graphics)
  # -o: output pattern (%d is page number)
  if mutool draw -r 72 -o "$TARGET_DIR/%d.jpg" "$PDF_PATH" 2>&1; then
     log "mutool extraction successful."
  else
     log "ERROR: mutool failed for $PDF_FILENAME. Skipping."
     continue
  fi
  
  # 6. Archive (safely overwrite if exists)
  mv -f "$PDF_PATH" "$PROCESSED_DIR/"
  log "Completed: $PDF_FILENAME"
done < "$TMP_LIST"

rm -f "$TMP_LIST"

echo "{\"status\": \"success\", \"logs\": \"$LOGS\"}"
